name: automatic-plugins
description: Plugins by Automatic — AI-ready workspaces, business operating systems, and tooling for solo founders and small teams.

plugins.name: business-os
plugins.description: Guides users through setting up an AI-ready local workspace and generates a canonical Business OS folder of markdown files (Offers, Pipeline, Delivery, Proof, Ops, Learned, Scoreboard) plus CLAUDE.md instruction files.
